Interface IRasterFunctionHelper2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster function helper.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("EB3AA1A6-1FA8-4F1B-9A4A-653A5D553212")]
public interface IRasterFunctionHelper2 : IRasterFunctionHelper
